Home.title: Coding Academy

Auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to your account, or create a new one.
Auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.

AuthMessages.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
AuthMessages.signupFailed: Could not create your account. Please try again.
AuthMessages.checkEmailToConfirm: Check your email to confirm your account.
AuthMessages.accountMaybeExists: If this is a new account, check your email to confirm it. If you already have an account, sign in or reset your password.
AuthMessages.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link.
AuthMessages.resetLinkInvalid: That reset link is invalid or has expired.
AuthMessages.updateFailed: Could not update your password. Please try again.
